schedules.title: Memory curation
schedules.prompt: Curate recent archived chats, memory proposals, and durable learnings. Use the memory agent. Prefer existing session-insights sections and update the configured vault; append durable learnings to Workspace/Learnings.md (error resolutions, non-obvious workarounds, user corrections, outdated assumptions — not routine work). Scan recently archived chats by project: when session-insights contain Decisions, Open loops, or material status changes for a vault-backed project, update that project's canonical doc (and log.md if present) — edit only when something actually changed. If nothing new to process since the last run, reply with a one-line no-op and stop. Report only processed counts plus changed files.

schedules.title: Skill evolution
schedules.prompt: Run `python3 -m ciao.skill_evolution` with the workspace default model. Summarize proposals written and any failed gates. Do not apply proposals automatically.

schedules.title: Weekly self-improvement review
schedules.prompt: Run the weekly self-improvement checklist from the installed ciao.stock package (`schedules/weekly-review-template.md`). If the past 7 days have no archived chats, no schedule misfires, and no actionable drift, reply with a one-line no-op and stop. Apply concrete low-risk local fixes and report anything that needs user approval.
